title: Snowflake Settings Navigation and Icon Enhancements
story: As a DataTools Pro user navigating the Snowflake integration settings, I want breadcrumb navigation showing Database > Schema > Table hierarchy and improved icons so that I can easily move up and down the Snowflake object hierarchy.
description:
Enhance the Snowflake settings pages with improved iconography and hierarchical breadcrumb navigation.

**Navigation**: Add a breadcrumb trail showing the current position in the Snowflake hierarchy:
- Database: List of databases
- Schema: List of schemas within the selected database
- Table: List of tables within the selected schema

The breadcrumb allows users to navigate up the hierarchy without using the browser back button.

**Icons**: Update the icons across all Snowflake settings pages to be more visually consistent and appropriate for the database/schema/table context.
acceptance_criteria: Breadcrumb navigation shows Database > Schema > Table hierarchy
Users can click breadcrumb links to navigate up the hierarchy
Icons are updated across all Snowflake settings pages
Icons are visually consistent with the rest of the application
ux_changes: Breadcrumb navigation added to Snowflake settings showing Database > Schema > Table hierarchy with clickable links. Updated icons across database list, schema list, table list, and field detail pages for visual consistency.
implementation_notes: Navigation breadcrumbs were already partially present and were refined. Icon updates were applied across six Snowflake settings pages.
comment_summary: Developer refined the existing navigation and updated icons across all Snowflake pages. Provided screenshots of each updated page.
